title: Create electron/auto-updater.ts main process module with IPC handlers
description: Create electron/auto-updater.ts exporting initAutoUpdater(mainWindow: BrowserWindow). Wires the autoUpdater event listeners ONCE (see '## External Docs Pinned' / 'Listener cleanup' in context.md) and registers four ipcMain.handle channels plus one webContents.send channel for renderer push events. Dev-mode safe per '### Dev mode gate' section.
acceptance_criteria: Exports a single named function initAutoUpdater(mainWindow: BrowserWindow): void
Imports { autoUpdater } from 'electron-updater' and { app, ipcMain, BrowserWindow } from 'electron'
Sets autoUpdater.autoDownload = false, autoUpdater.autoInstallOnAppQuit = true, autoUpdater.allowPrerelease = false
Registers ipcMain.handle for exactly these channels: 'update:check', 'update:download', 'update:install', 'update:get-version'

Subscribes to autoUpdater events: checking-for-update, update-available, update-not-available, download-progress, update-downloaded, error — each forwards a typed UpdateStatusPayload via mainWindow.webContents.send('update:status', payload)
When !app.isPackaged: registers IPC handlers that return { kind: 'idle' } or a dev stub, and skips autoUpdater event subscription (must not throw)
All functions are < 50 lines; no top-level side effects beyond the export
tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json succeeds with the new file included
No direct renderer access; all renderer communication is via IPC channels listed above
completion_summary: Created electron/auto-updater.ts: initAutoUpdater + friendlyMessage exports; 4 IPC handlers, 6 autoUpdater event sends to update:status; dev-mode gated
